titleStmt.title: SII 16.1: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 1. (A.R. No. 503 of 1906.) MŌPŪR, PULIVENDLA TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the left side of the wall at the entrance into the maṇḍapa of the shrine, Bhairavēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1273, Nandana, Chaitra śu. 15, corresponding to 1351 A.D., March 13. The year quoted falls in the reign of Harihara I.

It records a gift of the village Nāgūru in Pulivindala region and some land in Chadupurēvula in Mulki-nāḍu to God Bhairava by Sāveṁṇa-Oḍaya who was ruling in Udayagiripaṭṇa, for the merit of his father Kaṁparāju and mother Meṅgādēvi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣaṁbu
lu 1273 Agunēṁṭi naṁdana saṁvatsara caitra su 15
svasti śrīmaṁmmahāmaṁḍalēśvara harirāyavibhā
ḷa bhāsege tappuvarāyaragaṁḍa pū¨rvvasamudrādhipati vīra
śrī sāveṁṇayōḍayalu Udayagiri paṭṭamaṁdunu prithivi
rājyaṁmu sēyucuṁ dama taṁḍri kaṁparājukuṁnu tama
(tama) talli meṁgedēvi Aṁmagārikiṁnni puṁṇyamugānu mōṁpū
ri bhairavadēvara Aṁgaraṁgabhōgālaku puliviṁdala bhūmilō
nu nāgūruṁnnu mulkināṁṭi bhūmilōnu cadupu
rēvula ceruvukriṁda kha 2 maḍiṁnni dhārāpū¨rvvakamusēsi Ā
caṁdrā¨rkkastāyigānu yiccenu I dhaṁ¨rmmānaku
yavvaru vighnamaInānu gaṁgakaruta kavula bo
ḍicina pāpāna bōyinavāru peddakoḍkukapā
lāna kāṭikavaṭṭina pāpāna bōInavāru maṁgaḷamahāśrīśrīśrī
svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṁṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ . paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣpha
laṁ bhavēt .
